message:
test(fj-conformance): add 27 oracle tests for Reshape primitive

Comprehensive coverage of lax.reshape behavior:
- 1D to 2D/3D reshaping
- 2D to 1D/2D/3D reshaping
- 3D flattening and reconfiguration
- Dimension inference with -1 (first/middle/last position)
- Identity reshape (same shape)
- Adding/removing unit dimensions
- Float tensor support
- Scalar to tensor conversion
- Edge cases: single element, large tensors, negative values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
